stemHtml: An aircraft is cleared to cross runway 15 and stop at the runway holding position. At the holding position a red crossbar is lighted. The aircraft can proceed...

options.a: without clearance when the light switched off.
options.b: without clearance, as runway 15 is not in use, the light goes off.
options.c: after clearance and the light switched off.
options.d: after clearance when you see the green light.
